subcodes.first_line: Thy letter, dated the month of Sha'ban 1338, hath reached me, wherein thou didst pose several questions [3.5s]... ...As to the supplication of one’s needs in holy places: Since those sites are associated with God, they are, therefore, the most exalted of all spots. It is certain that the supplication of one’s needs in the most exalted of spots is not like praying in other places
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه که بتاریخ شهر شعبان سنه ۱۳۳۸ مرقوم نموده بودید رسید سئوالاتی چند فرموده
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @Shrines and Holy places, @higher encompasses the lower, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @the lower is unable to comprehend the higher
